chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الصَّلَاةِ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ عَلَيْهِمُ السَّلَامُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 20 – The Salawāt (Blessings) upon the Prophet Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> and the People<sup>asws</sup> of his<sup>saww</sup> Household

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/98)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/98)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) الصَّلَاةُ عَلَيَّ وَ عَلَى أَهْلِ بَيْتِي تَذْهَبُ بِالنِّفَاقِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww said: ‘The Salawāt upon measws and upon the Peopleasws of mysaww Household removes the hypocrisy’.
en.sarwar: 8. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘Asking from Allah favors (in the form of al-Salat ) for me and my family removes hypocrisy.’”
